ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "cpu_time_used" INTEGER /* CPU time used for the training session */,
  "estimated_performance" REAL /* Estimated training performance */,
  "wallclock_time" REAL /* Wallclock time for the training session */,
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incumbent configuration */,
  "configurator_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the automatic configurator */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings used for the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the training session */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_incumbent_id FOREIGN KEY ("incumbent_id") REFERENCES incumbent_configurations ("incumbent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incumbent_configurations" (
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incumbent configuration */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings of the incumbent */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the incumbent configuration was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the incumbent configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incumbent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurator_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configurator setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the user session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the user session */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user during the session (e.g., created, viewed, edited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sessions" (
  "dataset_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-session association */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time when the dataset was used in the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time when the dataset was used in the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sessions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_settings" (
  "algorithm_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm setting */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the algorithm parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_session" (
  "algorithm_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm-session association */,
  "algorithm_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm setting */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_session_algorithm_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_setting_id") REFERENCES algorithm_settings ("algorithm_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_session_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)
